title: The Root Stops
subtitle: Episode 8 of 12 · Season 4: The Fates Unravel
fate_triggered: Ferdinand's Oldest Root pauses for three heartbeats.
synopsis: Smurjan walks Null casually as he has for cosmic ages. He is on his weekly visit to Smurjan's Seat — the single rock in upper Null where he sits to think. Three heartbeats into his sit, the Heartbeat Point goes SILENT. Smurjan freezes. He has heard absence many times — Null is absence — but not THIS absence. Ferdinand's Oldest Root has stopped drinking. Smurjan rises. He walks (running in Null is impossible) to the Oldest Root. He arrives in 12 cosmic minutes. Root-Spirit 4.8B is already there. Her tattoo flickers. Root-Spirit One — the eldest, almost wholly bark, attached to the Oldest Root since the First Heartbeat — is, for the first time in cosmic memory, AGITATED. The First Tender stands beside the Root, hollow eye-sockets fixed. None of them speak. They wait. After a third heartbeat of pause, the Root drinks again. The Heartbeat Point resumes. The Root-Spirits exhale. Smurjan crouches. He places his hand on the Root. He says, in his Fused voice — for the first time in canon, alone in Null — 'Brother. I am sorry someone called you.' The Root warms slightly. Smurjan walks back. The Junior Root-Spirit, unassigned, watches him go and decides it is time to be assigned.

key_scenes.action: Smurjan begins his weekly think-sit. The Heartbeat Point goes silent.
12 cosmic minutes. Smurjan in pure Fused form.
Root-Spirit 4.8B arrives. Root-Spirit One is agitated for the first time. The First Tender holds vigil.
Three heartbeats of stillness. Then the Root drinks again.
Smurjan crouches, hand on the Root. Says: 'Brother. I am sorry someone called you.' The Root warms.
The unassigned Junior, watching, decides it is time to bond to a root.

cliffhanger: Bakasura, in some unseen elsewhere, smiles in his fourth face — the one that always points backward — for the first time in canon. The smile is recorded by the Butterfly Garden Wall.

panel_storyboard.composition: Pure black panel except for a single glowing point — the Heartbeat Point — and Smurjan's seated silhouette at his Seat.
The Heartbeat Point ceasing. Smurjan's silhouette turning. Both eyes visible, gold-flecked.
Smurjan walking through Null. No ground visible — only a sense of forward. Silver root-shapes faint in the distance.
The Oldest Root standing motionless in the void. Root-Spirit 4.8B at its base, bark-skinned, tattoo flickering on her forearm.
Root-Spirit One — almost wholly bark — visibly trembling. The First Tender beside, cork-bodied, stoic.
Three-panel montage of three pause heartbeats. Each heartbeat marked by a single black bar. The Root not drinking.
panel_storyboard.caption: ONE. ... TWO. ... THREE.

panel_storyboard.composition: The Root drinking again. Faint silver light returning to the Heartbeat Point. Root-Spirits visibly exhaling — bark cracking softly.
Smurjan crouching. Hand on the Root. Whispering. The Root visibly warming around his hand.
panel_storyboard.dialogue: Smurjan (Fused): 'Brother. I am sorry someone called you.'

panel_storyboard.composition: Smurjan walking away. The Junior Root-Spirit, in the background, taking a single step toward an unassigned root.
Cut to the Butterfly Garden in VOID-II. A single white butterfly landing on the wall. Bakasura's silhouette barely visible in the corner, smiling in the fourth face — the backward-facing one.
panel_storyboard.caption: Somewhere, Bakasura was watching.

cosmic_price_paid: Bakasura has revealed his fourth-face smile. The Butterfly Wall has recorded a decision somewhere in the multiverse. The Junior Root-Spirit is now assigned. Root-Spirit One is reassuring herself — softly — for the first time in cosmic memory.
callout_for_cosmos_drawer: In Season 4, Ferdinand's Oldest Root paused for three heartbeats. Smurjan apologized to the Root in Fused voice — alone in Null. Bakasura smiled in his fourth face.
